name: 04-30-revisit-care-proactive-notification-design
title: Revisit-care Proactive Notification Design
description: 为主动回访关怀/通知调度保留设计任务，先解决 opt-in、quiet hours、频控和取消订阅。
creator: lijin
notes: Completed as a frontend-only preview/policy boundary: notification route now shows revisit-care as disabled design preview, policy helper enforces opt-in, quiet hours, rate limit and unsubscribe, and spec records no-schema/no-delivery guardrails.

completed_scope: Pure revisit-care notification policy helper with opt-in, quiet-hours, rate-limit, unsubscribe, trigger/channel allowlist, and generated-content/marketing/social blockers.
Notification route preview panel clearly marked as disabled design preview with local-only toggles.
Frontend boundary spec added for future revisit-care notification work.
Script tests and desktop/mobile Playwright evidence added.
deferred_not_done: No real proactive notification scheduling, subscription persistence, push/email/SMS, or delivery queue.
No marketing push, advertising reactivation, visitor social graph, rankings, or platform-authored content generation.
